item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Aromatic Italian lasagna layered with rich ragù and creamy béchamel, servedwith fresh tomato salad with feta and olive vinaigrette, finished with basil (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Chashu mazemen, Japanese noodles tossed in a bold miso sauce with vegetables,topped with grilled pork, Asian crunch and soy marinated eggs. Teriyaki glazeon the side (1+7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Tofu mazemen, Japanese noodles tossed in a rich miso sauce with vegetables,topped with grilled tofu, Asian crunch and soy marinated eggs. Teriyakiglaze on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pulled pork with bold paprika and chipotle, juicy and lightly smoky, served ina brioche bun with crisp coleslaw and fried potato wedges (1+2+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Pulled tofu with paprika and chipotle, rich in flavour and warmth, served in abrioche bun with coleslaw and fried potato wedges

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Vietnamese pho with a deep, aromatic broth, served with tender beef brisket,fresh herbs and crisp vegetables (8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Vietnamese pho with a rich, fragrant broth, served with tofu, fresh herbs andcrisp vegetables

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Mexican flatbreads filled with spiced taco chicken, served with creamyguacamole, fresh tomato salsa, roasted corn and grilled cabbage (1+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Mexican flatbreads with roasted taco spiced squash, served with guacamole,tomato salsa, roasted corn and grilled cabbage
